text:
@a1374034 

Read where I said "Portal, the L4Ds, and the Half-Lifes are all fantastic experiences too." Their Steam service is the #1 Digital Distribution service for games, which speaks for itself. They're all quality products in my book.
author: @Rauzaruke

text: @Rauzaruke That's great but where's the quality products?
author: @jsmith434w

text:
@a1374034 

I'm sorry to disappoint you, but I certainly due admire Valve's work. They are able to inject incredible personality they put in their characters and facial animations, so much so that TF2, while being a multiplayer only game, has more energy put into the classes than most story driven games ever will. Portal, the L4Ds, and the Half-Lifes are all fantastic experiences too. Couple that with Steam, and free DLC support and you've got yourself a great company. Even with Valve time...
